category_sources: source_facts.description describes GeeseFS as a FUSE filesystem implementation over S3.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies geesefs; source_facts.homepage is the official GeeseFS repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/yandex-cloud/geesefs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states it is a FUSE filesystem over S3; source_facts.homepage identifies the official GeeseFS project.
